# BuckBike — Electric Scooter Rental, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam

> Affordable VinFast electric scooter rental in Đà Nẵng for tourists and locals.
> No driving licence required. Daily, weekly and monthly plans. Cash or bank
> transfer only. Free helmet and 24h support included with every rental.

## Pages
- [Home](https://buckbike.com/): Overview, how to book, fleet and location.
- [Fleet](https://buckbike.com/fleet): VinFast Evo 200 Lite, Feliz S and Theon — specs and detail pages.
- [Pricing](https://buckbike.com/price): Daily / weekly / monthly rates per model, what's included, and FAQ.

## Fleet
- VinFast Evo 200 Lite — up to 120 km range, 70 km/h. From 150,000₫/day.
- VinFast Feliz S — up to 100 km range, 78 km/h. From 180,000₫/day.
- VinFast Theon — up to 150 km range, 90 km/h. From 220,000₫/day.

## Key facts
- Location: 31-B2 An Thuong 37, Bắc Mỹ An, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
- Phone: +84 978 789 133
- Hours: 10:00–23:00 daily
- Payment: cash or direct bank transfer (no cards)
- Languages: English, Tiếng Việt, Русский, 日本語, 한국어, 中文
- Rating: 4.9 / 5 (62 reviews)

## Notes
- Prices shown are illustrative for a technical demo and may differ from the live store.
- This site is a rebuilt technical demo; content adapted from buckbike.com.
